page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: MIEH610, SPHL610 or SPHL698D.

Formerly: SPHL698D and SPHL610.

MIEH620 Global Health Communication and Promotion (3 Credits) Explores the critical components in developing, implementing

and evaluating health/population promotion and communication interventions. Emphasis is on theory application to a variety of cultural settings. Formative and quantitative research methods will be utilized. Recommended: MIEH605.

Credit Only Granted for. SPHL620 or SPHL698C.
